title: Verify toggle switch functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to disable notifications. | Click on the toggle switch again to re-enable notifications.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled (yellow circle on the right) and disabled (gray circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is enabled by default
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'.
expected_result: The toggle switch should be in the enabled state (yellow circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is disabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to disable notifications.
expected_result: The toggle switch should be in the disabled state (gray circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is enabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to enable notifications.
expected_result: The toggle switch should be in the enabled state (yellow circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is not clickable when disabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to disable notifications. | Attempt to click on the toggle switch again.
expected_result: The toggle switch should remain in the disabled state (gray circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is clickable when enabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to enable notifications. | Attempt to click on the toggle switch again.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled (yellow circle on the right) and disabled (gray circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is not clickable when enabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to enable notifications. | Attempt to click on the toggle switch again.
expected_result: The toggle switch should remain in the enabled state (yellow circle on the right).

title: Verify toggle switch is clickable when disabled
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Notifications settings page. | Locate the toggle switch labeled 'Send me discounts and other tasty updates'. | Click on the toggle switch to disable notifications. | Attempt to click on the toggle switch again.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled (yellow circle on the right) and disabled (gray circle on the right).
